emptyState.title: Select a game
emptyState.description: ReShade is configured per game from your library.

messages.installed: ReShade installed ({{api}}).{{warn}} Launch the game — Home for the ReShade menu.
messages.removed: ReShade removed from the game folder.{{warn}}
messages.removedBroken: Broken installation cleaned up — you can launch the game.{{warn}}
messages.notBundled: ReShade is not bundled in this build — see technical details.

preset.title: Post-processing preset
preset.hint: Performance — FPS · Clarity — balanced · Cinematic — softer

fineTune.title: Fine-tuning
fineTune.hint: Optional — the full menu is in-game via Home

enable.proxyRemovedNote: When launching from GSM, the proxy ReShade is removed from the game folder so the game starts without effects.

gpuSaving.title: GPU saving
gpuSaving.desc: Less load on the graphics card

licenses.addonSuffix: . BSD 3-Clause license. Game Settings Master is not affiliated with or endorsed by ReShade's authors.
licenses.fullTextPath: Full license text in the application directory:
licenses.presetEffects: GSM preset effects: Clarity (Ioxa), Vignette (CeeJay.dk), AdaptiveSharpen (bacondither) — see headers in

tech.devHint: Dev: addon DLL in src-tauri/presets/reshade/bin/, shaders — npm run reshade:setup

footer.launchHintMiddle: button in the header. In game —

apiPicker.title: Which graphics API does the game use?
apiPicker.description: GSM does not detect the API automatically — choose it manually, like in the ReShade installer. Not sure? Check the game's graphics settings: usually UE5 = DX12, older UE4 = DX11.

enable.title: Enable ReShade?
enable.body: ReShade is a third-party post-processor (a DLL proxy in the game folder). In online games with anti-cheat this can lead to an account ban. GSM does not check for anti-cheat — you accept the risk yourself.

install.title: Install ReShade into the game folder?
install.body: GSM will copy the ReShade DLL, ReShade.ini and the preset into the exe directory. An existing proxy DLL (dxgi.dll / d3d11.dll) will be saved to a backup. Close the game before installing.

launch.title: Launch with ReShade
launch.body: Before launching, GSM will prepare ReShade in the game folder. Reminder: using ReShade in multiplayer is at your own risk.

lib.blockedBrokenLaunch: Broken ReShade install and no working DLLs in the app. Open the ReShade tab → Remove, or click Play without ReShade.
lib.engineApiGeneric: Choose the API the game uses
lib.healthBrokenDetail: Invalid proxy in the game folder — Remove on the ReShade tab or Play in the header for auto-recovery
lib.alertBrokenMessage: An invalid ReShade remains in the game folder (corrupt proxy or wrong file). Click Remove below or launch with Play in the header — GSM will try to restore the install.
lib.alertNoDllMessage: ReShade DLLs were not found in the app install. Reinstall Game Settings Master or click Play without ReShade.
lib.alertDisclaimerMessage: GSM does not check for anti-cheat. ReShade may violate online game rules. Use at your own risk.
lib.statusGlobalOff: ● ReShade disabled globally · proxy removed on launch
lib.statusGameOff: ● Disabled for this game · proxy removed on launch

Clarity.label: Clarity
Clarity.hint: Local contrast — detail without global sharpness
